description: Add `codex-claude-bridge review-pr --pr <number>` via src/cli/commands.ts using the existing createHandler factory in src/cli/handlers.ts. Same optional flags as review-code (--focus, --depth, --session, --config, --json). Formatter prints `PR #N: "<title>" by @<author>` as a header before the findings list; scope-match and description-match findings render inline like any other finding. Acceptance: CLI integration test with mocked Codex client verifies stdout includes PR header and formatted findings; --json output is valid JSON.
title: review-pr CLI subcommand
